title: 6-837f12-th.jpg
description: This Cornell Box image, rendered at 1024x768 with 4 samples per pixel on a Dual P3 800MHz Linux-PC, showcases the simulation effect of ray tracing. Image Courtesy of Henrik Wann Jensen.

image_metadata.caption: This Cornell Box image, rendered at 1024x768 with 4 samples per pixel on a Dual P3 800MHz Linux-PC, showcases the simulation effect of ray tracing. (Image courtesy of Henrik Wann Jensen.)
image_metadata.credit: Image Courtesy of Henrik Wann Jensen.
image_metadata.image-alt: Two reflective balls with reflection and shadows presented in a box of pink and purple walls with light source on top.
